flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Lindsey Hopkins Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (388 vs 549).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lindsey Hopkins Technical College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (458 → 393).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lindsey Hopkins Technical College rose 47% between 2006 and 2009 (12.7% → 18.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lindsey Hopkins Technical College fell 19% between 2003 and 2005 ($2.2k → $1.8k).
